translation.literal_translation: And on what further grounds are the knowing self and the Supreme Self taken (as the pair)?
translation.technical_translation: Leading transition that asks for additional inferential grounds in the two-in-the-cave discussion.
translation.interpretive_note: Sets up the next supporting sutra for the jiva-paramatma reading.

lexical_notes.gloss: individual cognizer and Supreme Self pair
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Question seeks additional grounds for why this precise dual, rather than alternatives, is adopted in the cave passage.
Transition move demanding explicit justification beyond prior provisional reasoning.

lexical_notes.gloss: shift to a new inferential step within topic
lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Marks the procedural move from accepted claim to demand for stronger linga support.
Frames the need to restate and secure the dual-reference conclusion with further precision.

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit ka/kha lexical interpretation and eye-person technical terminology in records 1.2.033-1.2.038.
